questions.q: What is the economic system of the United States?
questions.explanation: The U.S. has a capitalist, free-market economy.

questions.q: In a free market, what mainly determines prices and what is produced?
questions.explanation: Prices and production are guided mostly by supply and demand.

questions.q: What is the role of the Federal Reserve?
options: It manages the money supply and interest rates as the central bank
questions.explanation: The Fed is the nation's central bank.

questions.q: Which amendment authorized the federal income tax?
questions.explanation: The 16th Amendment (1913) allows a federal income tax.

questions.q: Why is it important to pay federal taxes?
options: It is required by law and funds the federal government
questions.explanation: Taxes are required by law and pay for the government's work.
